data.title: Foster Made Named a MACH Alliance Systems Integrator, Joining an Elite Global Composable Community
data.description: Richmond, Virginia - Foster Made has recently become a Systems Integrator for the MACH Alliance, showcasing their proficiency in composable enterprise technology. This move underscores Foster Made's commitment to staying at the forefront of innovative solutions in the industry.

data.title: SUI Group Schedules Second Quarter 2026 Conference Call for August 6, 2026 at 5:00 p.m. ET
data.description: Wayzata-based company Sui Group Holdings Limited (NASDAQ: SUIG) will be holding a conference call on Thursday, August 6, 2026, at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time to review its financial and operating performance for the second quarter ending June 30, 2026. The company will first disclose its financial results in a press release before the scheduled call. The call will be led by SUI Group's executive team, with a Q&A session to follow.

data.title: Anthropic at 98% chance to beat top AI model by July. White House report seeks research changes despite proposed budget cuts.
data.description: The White House Office of Science and Technology Policy's report titled "Science: A New Golden Age" highlights the need for significant reforms in the management of federally funded research. Despite advocating for a more pro-science approach, the report also suggests budget cuts. This report aims to address key issues in the research sector and proposes changes to enhance efficiency and productivity.

data.title: Vance leads with 19.95% odds for 2028, as Trump sparks tariff concerns.GOP reacts amid repositioning. Learn more.
data.description: According to a recent report, President Trump has revived a trade dispute despite facing legal obstacles, causing concern among both Republican supporters and adversaries as they maneuver in response.

data.title: Pagaya’s Outlook Revised by Fitch Ratings to Positive
data.description: In a recent announcement, Pagaya Technologies Ltd. (NASDAQ: PGY) shared that Fitch Ratings upgraded the rating outlook for Pagaya and its subsidiary, Pagaya US Holding Company LLC, to Positive from Stable on July 15, 2026. Fitch also confirmed the Long-Term Issuer Default Ratings (IDRs) at 'B' and the senior unsecured debt rating at 'B'. This move signifies a positive shift in the financial standing of Pagaya, showcasing stability and potential growth opportunities ahead.

data.title: BitGo Prime Expands Digital Asset Trading Infrastructure with Its Global Liquidity Layer
data.description: BitGo Prime, a subsidiary of BitGo Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: BTGO), has unveiled the Global Liquidity Layer, an institutional trading infrastructure connecting clients to global digital asset markets. The Global Liquidity Layer aims to simplify operational challenges for institutions amidst rising digital asset liquidity. This offering is integrated within BitGo Prime, providing access to global markets for institutional clients.

data.title: Riskified Named to the CNBC World's Top Fintech Companies 2026 List
data.description: Riskified has been recognized in CNBC's list of the World's Top Fintech Companies for 2026 in the Payments category.

data.title: AGI Debuts World’s First PTO-Driven Mechanical Swing Conveyor
data.description: In Winnipeg, Manitoba, Farmers at Ag In Motion this week, from July 21-23, are being introduced to the world’s first PTO-driven mechanical swing conveyor by Ag Growth International Inc. (AGI) at booth 570. The new LCX4 conveyor, capable of moving up to 9,000 bushels per hour, is designed to be operated using a smaller yard tractor. This 2027-model conveyor represents a fresh strategy for high-capacity grain handling to meet the evolving needs of modern farm operations. The debut of this product marks AGI’s celebration of its 30th anniversary.

data.title: Freeport Second-Quarter and Six-Month 2026 Financial and Operating Results Release Available on Its Website
data.description: In Phoenix today, Freeport (NYSE: FCX) revealed its second-quarter and six-month 2026 financial and operational outcomes in a press release accessible on its Investor Relations website. The company will be conducting a conference call with financial analysts at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time today, as mentioned on its website. The call will also be available for viewing through an Internet webcast. For more details, visit https://investors.fcx.com/investors/news-releases.

data.title: Hecla Announces Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Call
data.description: Hecla Mining Company (NYSE:HL) revealed that it is set to disclose its second quarter operational and financial outcomes post the closure of the New York Stock Exchange on August 4, 2026. Following this, the firm will conduct a conference call and webcast on August 5, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time. To participate, individuals can access the webcast at https://events.q4inc.com/attendee/147975178 or visit www.hecla.com under Investor Relations. Mark your calendars for this important event on August 5, 2026, commencing at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time.

data.title: Graham Corporation Announces First Quarter Fiscal Year 2027 Financial Results Conference Call and Webcast
data.description: Batavia, New York - Graham Corporation, a prominent company specializing in essential technologies for various industries, is set to unveil its financial results for the first quarter of fiscal year 2027 on Thursday, August 6, 2026. As a leader in designing and producing critical fluid, power, heat transfer, vacuum, and advanced mixing solutions for Defense, Space, Energy, and Process sectors, Graham Corporation will provide insights into its performance before the financial markets open. A conference call and webcast will be conducted to analyze the numbers and operational outcomes.

data.title: Kodiak Gas Services Announces Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call Details
data.description: Kodiak Gas Services, Inc. is set to disclose its second quarter 2026 financial performance on August 6, 2026, following market closure. The company, listed on NYSE as KGS, will conduct an earnings conference call and webcast on August 7, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. ET (10:00 a.m. CT). The event, "Kodiak Gas Services Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call," will provide insights into the company's financial status. Participants can join the call to analyze the numbers and strategic plans for the future.

data.title: The Keg Is Now Available for Delivery Exclusively on DoorDash
data.description: Toronto - The Keg Steakhouse + Bar, a renowned Canadian steakhouse famous for its warm hospitality and popular menu, has revealed that it will now be offering delivery services exclusively on DoorDash. This service will be accessible throughout Canada and the United States, enabling customers to enjoy The Keg's trademark steaks, appetizers, and desserts from the comfort of their homes. With a legacy of over 50 years, The Keg has been a go-to choice for Canadians when celebrating significant events, and now customers can bring the celebration to their doorsteps, regardless of the occasion.

data.title: Acushnet Holdings Corp. to Announce Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results on August 6, 2026
data.description: In Fairhaven, Acushnet Holdings Corp. (NYSE: GOLF) will release its Q2 2026 financial results on August 6, 2026, at around 6:30 a.m. Eastern Time. The results will be accessible through Acushnet Investor Relations website (http://www.acushnetholdingscorp.com/ir) and the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission website.

data.title: Google increases A.I. investment projections, sparking concerns on Wall Street about potential returns.
data.description: The prominent tech company has once more increased its estimations for investing in artificial intelligence, with a significant investment amount. Despite this, concern remains among many in the financial sector regarding the potential return on investment.

data.title: Cyclospora outbreak linked to lettuce prompts drop in salad sales at popular chains, with foot traffic down in recent weeks.
data.description: In the past few weeks, there has been a decline in foot traffic to popular chains like Chopt and Chipotle. This drop in visitors is attributed to a recent recall by Taylor Farms and shifting guidance from the F.D.A. regarding food safety. The decrease in foot traffic represents a notable decrease in customers visiting these establishments.

data.title: Lantern Pharma Receives USPTO Notice of Allowance for Patent Covering Biomarker-Guided Treatment with LP-184 (Zirdafulven) in Multiple Solid Tumor Cancers
data.description: Dallas-based Lantern Pharma Inc. (NASDAQ: LTRN) has revealed that the U.S. Patent and Trademark Office has granted a Notice of Allowance for their U.S. Patent Application No. 17/230,821, named "Methods for the Treatment of Solid Tumor Cancers Using Illudins and Biomarkers." The approved claims in the patent focus on techniques for identifying and treating individuals with ovarian solid tumor cancers. Lantern Pharma is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company that leverages artificial intelligence and genomic information to create personalized cancer treatments.

data.title: Coforge Launches Nuuron: The AI Operating System for the Autonomous Enterprise
data.description: Coforge Nuuron has introduced an AI Operating System (AI-OS) in Princeton, N.J. and Greater Noida, India. This system aims to assist enterprises in advancing from individual AI projects to standardizing AI-powered results.

data.title: Cobalt Launches Autonomous Pentest to Bolster Continuous Security Testing Across the Full Application Portfolio
data.description: In Boston, Cobalt™, a company specializing in pentesting as a service (PTaaS) and known for its expertise in continuous offensive security testing, has introduced Cobalt Autonomous Pentest. This innovative service allows for ongoing offensive security evaluations throughout a company's complete application range, providing prompt and practical pentest results within a swift 24-hour timeframe. The integration of artificial intelligence (AI) is revolutionizing the speed of application security processes. With AI-driven development, organizations can now benefit from faster and more efficient security evaluations.

data.title: GTT Recognized with Three 2026 Visionary Spotlight Awards for Demonstrated Channel Excellence
data.description: A prominent networking and security service provider for multinational organizations, GTT Communications Inc. headquartered in Arlington, Virginia, was recently honored with three Visionary Spotlight Awards by ChannelVision Magazine. These accolades include Channel Program of the Year, CSP Network Infrastructure Innovation of the Year, and Most Responsive Supplier Channel Team of the Year. Additionally, GTT received the Channel Partner of the Year Award for the second time in a row, showcasing their commitment to enhancing their channel partner program. This recognition underscores GTT's ongoing efforts to innovate and excel in the industry.
